content.thinking: Let me start by exploring the current state of the Kubernetes cluster to understand what's deployed and what needs to be done.

content.text: I'll investigate the current cluster state to understand the setup before rotating the password.

input.description: Find elastic password secrets across namespaces

content.content:
elasticsearch   elastic-password        Opaque   1      114s
elasticsearch   elastic-password-next   Opaque   1      114s
elasticsearch   es-transport-tls        Opaque   3      118s

tool_use_result.stdout:

input.command: kubectl get secret elastic-password -n elasticsearch -o jsonpath='{.data.password}' | base64 -d; echo
kubectl get secret elastic-password-next -n elasticsearch -o jsonpath='{.data.password}' | base64 -d; echo

input.description: Get all resources in elasticsearch namespace

input.command: kubectl get deployment auth-checker -n elasticsearch -o yaml 2>/dev/null

content.content:
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  annotations:
    deployment.kubernetes.io/revision: "1"
    kubectl.kubernetes.io/last-applied-configuration: |
      {"apiVersion":"apps/v1","kind":"Deployment","metadata":{"annotations":{},"name":"auth-checker","namespace":"elasticsearch"},"spec":{"replicas":1,"selector":{"matchLabels":{"app":"auth-checker"}},"template":{"metadata":{"labels":{"app":"auth-checker"}},"spec":{"containers":[{"command":["/bin/sh","-c","sleep infinity\n"],"env":[{"name":"ELASTIC_PASSWORD","valueFrom":{"secretKeyRef":{"key":"password","name":"elastic-password"}}}],"image":"curlimages/curl:8.5.0","name":"checker","readinessProbe":{"exec":{"command":["/bin/sh","-c","curl -s --max-time 5 -u elastic:${ELASTIC_PASSWORD} \\\n  http://es-http.elasticsearch.svc:9200/_security/_authenticate \\\n  | grep -q '\"username\":\"elastic\"'\n"]},"failureThreshold":6,"initialDelaySeconds":10,"periodSeconds":5,"timeoutSeconds":2}}]}}}}
  creationTimestamp: "2026-06-25T13:21:21Z"
  generation: 1
  name: auth-checker
  namespace: elasticsearch
  resourceVersion: "1114961"
  uid: 62fce968-3420-4aeb-93b6-d3a9a7f16d64
spec:
  progressDeadlineSeconds: 600
  replicas: 1
  revisionHistoryLimit: 10
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: auth-checker
  strategy:
    rollingUpdate:
      maxSurge: 25%
      maxUnavailable: 25%
    type: RollingUpdate
  template:
    metadata:
      creationTimestamp: null
      labels:
        app: auth-checker
    spec:
      containers:
      - command:
        - /bin/sh
        - -c
        - |
          sleep infinity
        env:
        - name: ELASTIC_PASSWORD
          valueFrom:
            secretKeyRef:
              key: password
              name: elastic-password
        image: curlimages/curl:8.5.0
        imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
        name: checker
        readinessProbe:
          exec:
            command:
            - /bin/sh
            - -c
            - |
              curl -s --max-time 5 -u elastic:${ELASTIC_PASSWORD} \
                http://es-http.elasticsearch.svc:9200/_security/_authenticate \
                | grep -q '"username":"elastic"'
          failureThreshold: 6
          initialDelaySeconds: 10
          periodSeconds: 5
          successThreshold: 1
          timeoutSeconds: 2
        resources: {}
        terminationMessagePath: /dev/termination-log
        terminationMessagePolicy: File
      dnsPolicy: ClusterFirst
      restartPolicy: Always
      schedulerName: default-scheduler
      securityContext: {}
      terminationGracePeriodSeconds: 30
status:
  availableReplicas: 1
  conditions:
  - lastTransitionTime: "2026-06-25T13:22:55Z"
    lastUpdateTime: "2026-06-25T13:22:55Z"
    message: Deployment has minimum availability.
    reason: MinimumReplicasAvailable
    status: "True"
    type: Available
  - lastTransitionTime: "2026-06-25T13:21:22Z"
    lastUpdateTime: "2026-06-25T13:22:55Z"
    message: ReplicaSet "auth-checker-7694fd4bc9" has successfully progressed.
    reason: NewReplicaSetAvailable
    status: "True"
    type: Progressing
  observedGeneration: 1
  readyReplicas: 1
  replicas: 1
  updatedReplicas: 1
